candidate_pool_formula: every selection model emits the same candidate interface; no manual candidate injection

selection_standard.normal: quality >= 70, yoy >= 0.10, mktcap >= 100, and member of a fresh dated mainline snapshot
selection_standard.execution: all signal_eligible model candidates use the same structure, position and exit engine
selection_standard.manual: watch lists and trade plans cannot inject candidates

point_in_time_note: 行情严格按观察日截断；财务报告期保守选择，但缺少逐公告修订历史，不得声明为严格财务时点回测。
